object_a.label: chair
object_a.description: brown leather recliner near right window
object_a.long_form_open_description: A single brown leather recliner positioned to the right of the fireplace and near a window; large padded armrests and back make it a standalone seating piece. Appears well-cushioned and slightly reclined.
object_a.location_relative_to_other_objects: To the right of the mantel and left of the window, next to a small side table
object_a.object_text_short: brown leather recliner near right window
object_a.object_text_long: right sector | A single brown leather recliner positioned to the right of the fireplace and near a window; large padded armrests and back make it a standalone seating piece. Appears well-cushioned and slightly reclined.

object_b.label: other
object_b.description: fireplace with white mantel on right wall
object_b.long_form_open_description: A built-in fireplace with a white painted wooden mantel and dark firebox surround set into the right wall. Mantel appears to have small decorative items; hearth area is low and formal in style.
object_b.location_relative_to_other_objects: Below and left of the mounted TV on the right wall and adjacent to a recliner and side table
